data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include specific details or outcomes related to the scenario of 'Primary card declined, backup charged'. While the step outlines an expected result, there are no concrete traces or snapshots captured to confirm the behavior of the payment methods under the specified conditions. Therefore, it is not possible to determine if the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a failure report as required.
gaps: No evidence of the actual outcome of the payment method scenario.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Capture payment method scenario outcomes
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define specific tests to validate the behavior of primary and backup payment methods.
